title: hieracium aestivum subsp. subcrocatum
intro: Hieracium aestivum subsp. subcrocatum is a subspecies of the Hieracium plant, commonly known as hawkweed, a perennial plant with yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hieracium aestivum subsp. subcrocatum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, but proper identification and dosing are essential to ensure safe use.
